ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomes" (
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The genomic sequence itself */,
  "fitness" REAL /* The fitness value of the genomic sequence */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the genomic sequence */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the genomic sequence */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the genomic sequence */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the genomic sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of the genomic sequence (e.g. DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genomic sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genomic sequence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_genomes" (
  "user_genome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-genome pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the genome */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome uploaded by the user */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genome was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genome was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_genome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_genomes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_genomes_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g. tournament, friendly match) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game result */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the game */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome used in the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g. win, loss, draw) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the game result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the leaderboard is being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is being ranked */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome used by the user */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the game */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the game */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_stats" (
  "genome_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome statistic */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome for which the statistic is being tracked */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g. fitness, wins, losses) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_stats_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stats" (
  "user_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user statistic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the statistic is being tracked */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g. games played, wins, losses) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the statistic is being tracked */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g. number of players, average score) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_comments" (
  "genome_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome comment */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome for which the comment is being made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_comments_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_ratings" (
  "genome_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genome rating */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome for which the rating is being made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g. 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genome_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genome_ratings_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "game_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the comment is being made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "game_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game rating */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the rating is being made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g. 1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
